about_me.title: About me
about_me.description: Passionate software developer with a strong foundation in mathematics and computer science. I started teaching myself programming in high school and continued developing my skills throughout my math degree, eventually pursuing a second degree in computer science. Today, programming is both my profession and my greatest passion.

sibill.description: Full-stack developer for enterprise B2B platform. Develop both back-end and front-end components in collaboration with product managers and designers. Thrive in agile environments with cross-functional teams, practicing continuous communication and iterative development.

argo.description: Computer Vision specialist with expertise in designing, prototyping and implementing advanced algorithms. Led development of a proprietary C++ library, achieving significant performance optimizations for ARM devices, smartphones and x86 architectures.

education.title: Education
education.cs_bachelor: Bachelor degree in Computer Science (studied while working)

computer_science.title: Computer science
computer_science.description: Committed to continuous learning and staying current with emerging technologies. Actively participate in tech meetups including JVM User Group, XP User Group, Rust Milano and OpenSource Saturday to remain at the forefront of industry developments.

bike.title: Bike
bike.description: Passionate cyclist - using biking as my primary mode of urban transportation and for weekend excursions

food.title: Food
food.description: Enthusiastic home cook who believes that good food is one of life's greatest pleasures. I enjoy combining ingredients creatively to create dishes that are greater than the sum of their parts.
